title: UltimateChat
description:
UltimateChat - is a powerful chat plugin, which has discord integration, supports PlaceholderAPI and contains much more features than other competitors. 

Download the plugin to check them out! ;)
body:
# 🌟 UltimateChat — The Modern Chat Plugin You’ve Been Waiting For

![UltimateChat!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bf5cd4025cadc998d7b50250d6a8b58cf31ba9c.png)

**UltimateChat** is a powerful, actively maintained Minecraft chat plugin that brings unmatched flexibility, innovation, and seamless Discord integration.

## 🔧 Key Features

* ✅ **Full Discord Sync** — Bidirectional message sync with Discord. New: msg sending to discord if you offline.
* 🔄 **Actively Developed** — Frequent updates with new features and improvements
* 🔗 **PlaceholderAPI Support** — Use dynamic placeholders anywhere
* 🧩 **Highly Configurable** — Full control over messages, formats, and behavior
* 💻 **Open Source** — Transparent development and community-driven
* 🧠 **Unique Features** — Includes innovations not found in any other plugin

---

## 💬 Commands Overview

| Command                                            | Description                                      |
| -------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| `/uc reload (all/config/language)`                 | Reload the plugin’s configuration                |
| `/uc messages (join/leave/death/discord/auto_message) (on/off)` | Enable or disable specific message types         |
| `/uc help`                                         | Help command     |
| `/msg <player> <message>`                          | Send a private message(with discord sync) (aliases: `/pm`, `/tell`) |
| `/ball`                                            | Magic 8-ball feature                             |
| `/try`                                             | Try something randomly                           |
| `/flip`                                            | Flip a coin                                      |
| `/dice`                                            | Roll a dice                                      |

All main commands use aliases such as `/uc`, `/chat`, and `/ultimate`.
 For a full list of available commands and advanced usage, please refer to the official documentation(soon)
---

## 🧩 Requirements

This plugin **requires [PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/)** and **[LuckPerms](https://modrinth.com/plugin/luckperms)** to function properly.

---

## 🔗 Why UltimateChat?

UltimateChat isn’t just another chat plugin — it’s a complete communication system for your server. Whether you're building an RPG experience, running a large network, or just want a more immersive chat environment, UltimateChat has the tools and customization to meet your needs.

> Join the next generation of server communication.
> ✨ Try **UltimateChat** today!
